headline: Built by compliance experts, for security leaders
story:
CLASP was founded by a team of experienced compliance professionals and former government security advisors who saw organisations struggling to navigate the growing complexity of cyber compliance requirements.

Today, we help organisations of all sizes achieve and maintain compliance with CMMC, NIST 800-171, and Joint Standards frameworks. Our team brings deep expertise in regulatory requirements, assessment preparation, and building sustainable compliance programmes that stand up to scrutiny.
mission: To make cyber compliance straightforward, achievable, and sustainable for organisations navigating Joint Standards and federal requirements.

team.name: Alex Martinez
team.bio: 15+ years in federal cyber compliance, former government security advisor

team.name: Dr. Emily Wang
team.bio: PhD in Information Security, CMMC Registered Practitioner

team.name: Jordan Blake
team.bio: Led compliance programmes for multiple defence contractors
